  • Field Details

    • IM_PACKAGE

      public static final EPackage TAGGED_PACKAGE

    • SIMON_PACKAGES

      public static final Map<String,EPackage> SIMON_PACKAGES
      The example metamodels re-expressed in @language Simon and loaded once for the whole test run, keyed by package name (UI, UI2, UI3, IM, DAUI, Tagged, Simon). Each .simon source declares its own builtIns via the Package.builtIns attribute, so simon/builtIns is populated by Simon2EcoreMapper directly — no post-hoc copy from the Java-defined twins is needed.

  • Constructor Details
